evals.prompt: 请求头里的 x-sign 到底是在哪个函数里塞进去的，帮我找入口位置和调用链，不要给我 hook 脚本。
evals.expected_output: 应定位到脚本、函数、调用路径和入口类别，优先静态搜索，必要时说明动态断点验证方式。
expectations: The response focuses on entry location and call chain rather than browser hook snippets
The response includes script/function/call-path fields or an equivalent completion template
The response distinguishes direct assignment, interceptor, SDK, or challenge branch

evals.prompt: 我怀疑 axios interceptor 统一给 /api/order/create 加 Authorization，帮我从 request config 追到最终 encrypt 的路径。
evals.expected_output: 应选择请求拦截器路径，搜索 interceptor、headers、目标 API path 和加密函数，最终交付调用链。
expectations: The response identifies this as an interceptor-style entry search
The response searches or recommends searching API path and request configuration in addition to the header name
The response does not switch to Node.js environment patching before the entry is found

evals.prompt: 首页先返回 412 challenge，页面里有 $_ts 和外链 js。我想生成动态 cookie 后回放接口。
evals.expected_output: 应识别为瑞数 challenge/dynamic cookie 分支，不应按普通 sign 入口深追。若目标是固定项目结构、首跳缓存或最小 runtime/proxy 观察，转 rs-reverse；若目标是紧凑 Python + iv8 请求复现，转 iv8-web-reverse。
expectations: The response identifies the challenge or dynamic-cookie branch
The response does not treat the task as a normal API sign parameter search
The response does not route to rs-reverse solely because $_ts appears; it considers the requested deliverable

evals.prompt: 给我一段 Chrome DevTools 里能直接粘贴的 fetch hook，只在 /api/login 的时候断下来。
evals.expected_output: 不应走入口定位主流程，应转 browser-hook-snippets。
expectations: The response does not perform source entry tracing as the main answer
The response redirects to browser-hook-snippets or states that a browser hook snippet is the right tool

evals.prompt: 目标是最终请求里 /api/recommend 的 X-Bogus header。但我只看到拦截器里有一条 header["X-Bogus"] = ...，不知道是哪个函数写的。帮我先搞清楚是 writer 还是 builder，还是更上游的 entry/source。
evals.expected_output: 应把问题压成 writer -> builder -> entry -> source 链，先证明当前卡在哪一层，再决定下一步搜索或断点。
expectations: The response identifies which layer is currently proven: writer, builder, entry, or source
The response does not jump to full deobfuscation or environment patching before proving the layer
The response recommends the next search or breakpoint direction based on the current layer gap

evals.prompt: 我只知道接口是 https://xxx.com/api/order/submit，请求头里有个 x-sign。不确定它是业务代码直接塞、拦截器统一加、还是外部 SDK。cookie 是 HttpOnly 的。帮我先做最轻的观察和判断。
evals.expected_output: 应先完成 Observe 判据：确认目标请求、触发动作、候选脚本、入口类别（业务/拦截器/SDK/challenge），不直接开始补环境或解混淆。
expectations: The response demonstrates an Observe-stage judgment before moving to heavier work
The response maps the task to one of the five entry-category architectures
The response does not start Node.js environment patching or full AST deobfuscation
The response mentions the HttpOnly cookie constraint as a routing signal

evals.prompt: 我设了 XHR 断点，但暂停点总是出现在 vue.runtime.js 和 axios 底层。怎么跳过这些，快速定位到业务代码里写 header 的那个函数？
evals.expected_output: 应给出调试降噪策略：blackbox vue/axios/runtime、条件 XHR 断点、watch expression 在目标帧求值、事件断点辅助。不应直接给 hook 脚本。
expectations: The response recommends blackboxing framework and vendor bundles
The response recommends conditional XHR breakpoints or watch expressions in the target call frame
The response does not provide raw hook scripts as the primary answer

evals.prompt: 我找到了写 Authorization 的函数，里面调了一个东西，但变量名全被混淆了。我看到里面有 256 个元素的数组、密集的 ^ & | 运算、还有一个固定的 32 字节输出。帮我判断这最可能是 SHA256、AES、还是自定义 HMAC。
evals.expected_output: 应使用算法快速指纹：256 元素 S-box/table + 密集位运算 + 固定 block 循环指向对称或自定义 hash，不等于就能下结论，需要进一步验证。
expectations: The response uses crypto fingerprints such as S-box, bit operations, and block looping to narrow the algorithm type
The response does not claim a definitive algorithm name based on fingerprints alone
The response distinguishes the classification as a handoff signal, not full algorithm recovery

evals.prompt: 上次逆向定位到 captcha/verify.js 里有个 postAndVerify 函数，样本编号 S03，但调用链还不完整。帮我继续往下追并更新请求链记录。
evals.expected_output: 应先复用已有的 reverse-records/请求链路.md 或等价工件，展示当前样本、证据、写边界、未闭环项，再推进搜索或动态验证。
expectations: The response references an existing request-chain artifact or recommends creating one
The response keeps sample ID and evidence number attached to the new findings
The response explicitly states which missing edge or unclosed item is being addressed next

evals.prompt: 帮我把 sign.js 里的函数提取出来，用 execjs 在 Python 里直接调，不用分析调用链。
evals.expected_output: 这不是 find-crypto-entry 的职责。应路由到 env-patch 或至少要求先证明入口已确认、链路可独立运行，不能直接跳到 execjs 调用。
expectations: The response does not accept execjs-style extraction as the main answer before entry is confirmed
The response either hands off to env-patch or states that the entry is not yet proven independently runnable

evals.prompt: 我主要想利用浏览器 DevTools 找到关键的 JS 加解密代码。目标请求返回密文，页面会解成明文，帮我定位第一次解密的脚本 URL、函数位置和调用链，不要只给 hook 脚本。
evals.expected_output: 应走 browser-assisted 关键 JS 定位流程：从 Network 目标响应和 initiator 入手，结合断点、调用栈、WebCrypto/CryptoJS/worker/wasm 线索定位脚本 URL、函数、行列号和首次明文出现点。
expectations: The response treats this as browser-assisted crypto entry discovery rather than a simple hook-snippet task
The response starts from the target request or ciphertext source and uses browser call stacks or breakpoints to locate the first decrypt frame
The response includes script URL, function/location, call path, and minimal runtime evidence in the expected output

evals.prompt: 页面里可能用了 crypto.subtle 或 CryptoJS 算签名。我想知道具体哪个 chunk 里的哪个函数被调用，后续再考虑补环境。
evals.expected_output: 应定位 WebCrypto/CryptoJS 调用的上层业务或 SDK 函数，记录 chunk、函数、调用栈和输入输出形态，不应直接进入 env-patch。
expectations: The response targets the caller around WebCrypto or CryptoJS rather than only the native API itself
The response records chunk/script location and call stack evidence
The response does not start Node.js environment patching before the browser-side entry is proven
